args.query:
SELECT
    LTRIM(o.OwnerId, '#') as AgentId,
    AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) as AvgTurnaround
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON LTRIM(o.ContractID__c, '#') = LTRIM(c.Id, '#')
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate <= '2023-04-30'
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY AvgTurnaround ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT
    LTRIM(o.OwnerId, '#') as AgentId,
    AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) as AvgTurnaround
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON LTRIM(o.ContractID__c, '#') = LTRIM(c.Id, '#')
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate <= '2023-04-30'
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY AvgTurnaround ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT
    LTRIM(o.OwnerId, '#') as AgentId,
    AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) as AvgTurnaround,
    COUNT(*) as NumDeals
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON LTRIM(o.ContractID__c, '#') = LTRIM(c.Id, '#')
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate <= '2023-04-30'
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY AvgTurnaround ASC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT
    LTRIM(o.OwnerId, '#') as AgentId,
    AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) as AvgTurnaround,
    COUNT(*) as NumDeals
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON LTRIM(o.ContractID__c, '#') = LTRIM(c.Id, '#')
WHERE c.CompanySignedDate >= '2023-04-01' AND c.CompanySignedDate <= '2023-04-30'
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY AvgTurnaround ASC;

args.query:
SELECT 
    LTRIM(o.OwnerId, '#') as AgentId,
    o.CloseDate, 
    c.CompanySignedDate,
    o.CreatedDate
FROM Opportunity o
LEFT JOIN Contract c ON LTRIM(o.ContractID__c, '#') = LTRIM(c.Id, '#')
WHERE o.CloseDate >= '2023-04-01' AND o.CloseDate <= '2023-04-30'

exec_args.sql:
SELECT 
    LTRIM(o.OwnerId, '#') as AgentId,
    o.CloseDate, 
    c.CompanySignedDate,
    o.CreatedDate
FROM Opportunity o
LEFT JOIN Contract c ON LTRIM(o.ContractID__c, '#') = LTRIM(c.Id, '#')
WHERE o.CloseDate >= '2023-04-01' AND o.CloseDate <= '2023-04-30'
